MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-09-2012 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON JAN-14-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. JEFFREY BRANDSTETTER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT PAUL CHEN IS STILL IN CHINA. BOTH PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL BUT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WAS UNABLE TO GET AN ORIGINAL SIGNATURE FROM MR. CHEN WHO WAS UNABLE TO MAIL THE DOCUMENT BECAUSE OF THE HOLIDAYS IN CHINA. THE COURT CONTINUED THE TRIAL TO 1/14/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT PAUL CHEN AND FURTHER NOTICE IS WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
